title: Der Bastard
writer: Mario Almirante, Leo Birinsky, Jules Sebastian Dumont d'Urville
actors: Maria Jacobini, Erich Kaiser-Titz, Mary Kid
plot: Sensational adventures of a young lady with her baby, born out of wedlock. Marrying the father, she discovers his worthlessness. George Barry, returning after two years' absence , finds that Marie, the daughter of wealthy parents,...
